response: During the 2024-25 NBA season, 40-year-old Los Angeles Lakers player LeBron James—who earned an All-Star nod that campaign—competed in 71 games. Across those outings, he posted impressive per-game averages of 28.4 points, 7.2 rebounds, and 8.1 assists, a remarkable stat line that underscores his sustained elite play at an advanced age.
